title: fix: docker APIv2 `images/get`
body:
Fixing docker APIv2 `images/get/` endpoint.
Image format must be set to "docker-archive" not empty string.

resolves #10229

comments.body:
For future reference, for the sake of the person creating the release notes, it's really nice to have a small description, even if it's mostly cut/pasted from the issue, in the description field rather than just the link to the issue.

LGTM once @edsantiago 's comment is addressed.

[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *edsantiago*, *matejvasek* The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Fpodman). The pull request process is described [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process)
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/master/OWNERS)~~ [edsantiago] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment
@edsantiago I found out how to fix the multi image download, but maybe I should do it in separate PR
I am totally a fan of small, clean, reviewable PRs!
Changes LGTM but a friendly reminder to keep the commit message descriptive.
